props.absolute: Positions the component absolutely within its parent, centering the progress indicator and placing details without affecting layout.
props.type: Determines which progress indicator to render.
props.label: Text displayed alongside the progress indicator.
props.detailsPosition: Controls the position of the details (label and value) relative to the progress indicator.
props.max: Sets the maximum value for the progress indicator.
props.hideLabel: Hides the label text from the progress indicator.
props.hideValue: Hides the value text from the progress indicator.
props.valueFormat: Formatter for the `aria-valuetext`. Use `[value]` and `[max]` as placeholders in strings, or pass a function that receives `{ value, max }` and returns a string.
